phases.name: Vision Calibration
phases.notes: Uses frozen PNGs with intentional traps. Grade against calibration/answer-key.md.

phases.name: Visual / Information Architecture
phases.notes: Standalone visual eval. Role-agnostic. Tests layout, not content.

phases.name: Content Eval — PM/TPM
phases.notes: Standalone content eval through PM hiring lens.

phases.name: Content Eval — SWE
phases.notes: Standalone content eval through SWE hiring lens.

phases.name: JD-Based Eval (Two-Pass)

passes.name: Vision / Visual Hierarchy
passes.notes: No JD or company context. Pure visual evaluation.

passes.name: Content Match vs. JD
passes.notes: Company dossier is optional. Evaluates content against JD requirements. report-guide.md is both prompt part and report footer — the finding scales ship with every saved report.

phases.notes: Both passes run automatically when --jd is specified. Vision first, content second.

interpretation.cross_model_consensus: If 2+ models flag the same issue, treat as real signal.
interpretation.single_model_flag: Note but don't overreact. May be model-specific noise.
interpretation.hallucination_check: If a model references visual elements not on the page, discard its entire response.
